top_signals.title: Oil Gains, US Stock Futures Drop on New Strikes: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil gained and US equity futures ticked lower after the US said it is striking Iran for the second straight day, an escalation of violence that threatens to choke shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump says Ukraine to be allowed to make Patriot missile interceptors - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Trump says Ukraine to be allowed to make Patriot missile interceptors  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board's annual bank stress test confirms that large banks are well positioned to weather a severe recession and able to continue to lend to households and businesses
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board's annual bank stress test confirms that large banks are well positioned to weather a severe recession and able to continue to lend to households and businesses

top_signals.title: Build a Palestinian State

top_signals.title: Harley-Davidson’s Credit Ratings Get Cut to Junk By S&P
top_signals.summary: S&P Global Ratings cut Harley-Davidson Inc.’s credit grades to junk status on Wednesday, citing the company’s strategy to start selling lower-cost motorcycles to boost revenue.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix US Offering Is More Than Seven Times Oversubscribed
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s US listing is more than seven times oversubscribed, according to people familiar with the matter, as the South Korean memory chipmaker prepares to price its offering Thursday.

top_signals.title: How Europe Can Get Putin’s Attention
top_signals.summary: The continent must overcome its Russia predicament.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
